name: Daily Brief Generator
shortDescription: Compiles a personalized morning briefing from news feeds, calendar, email signals, and KPI dashboards into a structured executive summary delivered before the workday begins.
knownLimitations: News source coverage limited to configured RSS/API feeds — does not perform open web browsing
Calendar enrichment requires CRM integration; without it, meeting context is basic
Does not summarize email content — only detects flagged labels and counts
changelogSummary: v1.2.0: Added KPI delta comparison vs prior period. v1.1.0: Slack and Notion delivery targets. v1.0.0: Initial release with email delivery.
documentationSnippet: Configure `delivery_time` in cron format (e.g., `30 6 * * 1-5` for 6:30 AM weekdays). Set `recipient_channel` to `email`, `slack`, or `notion`.
seoTitle: Daily Brief Generator Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Automate executive morning briefings with the Daily Brief Generator skill — compiles news, calendar, and KPIs into a 5-minute structured summary.

name: Research Summarizer
shortDescription: Queries multiple sources (web search, internal documents, databases) on a given topic and synthesizes findings into a structured research report with citations, key findings, and recommended actions.
knownLimitations: Web search depth limited to top 10 results per query by default
Cannot access paywalled content without configured credentials
Synthesis quality depends on source quality — garbage in, garbage out
changelogSummary: v1.3.1: Fixed citation deduplication bug. v1.3.0: Added confidence scoring. v1.2.0: Internal document search integration.
documentationSnippet: Set `depth_level` to `surface` (3 sources), `standard` (10 sources), or `deep` (25+ sources). Deep mode significantly increases execution time.
seoTitle: Research Summarizer Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Automate research tasks with the Research Summarizer skill — queries multiple sources and synthesizes findings into structured reports with citations.

name: Lead Enrichment
shortDescription: Enriches incoming leads with company data, LinkedIn profiles, technographic information, and buying signals from public sources, populating CRM fields automatically before the first sales touchpoint.
knownLimitations: Enrichment data accuracy depends on third-party provider freshness
LinkedIn data subject to platform rate limits and terms of service
Some SMB companies have limited publicly available data
changelogSummary: v2.0.0: Redesigned output schema for CRM compatibility. v1.5.0: Added technographic data source. v1.0.0: Initial release.
documentationSnippet: Pass `company_domain` for best enrichment results. If unavailable, the skill will attempt domain inference from `lead_email`.
seoTitle: Lead Enrichment Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Automatically enrich incoming leads with company data, technographics, and buying signals before the first sales touch.

name: Email Drafter
shortDescription: Drafts personalized outbound emails or follow-ups using contact context, deal stage, and configured tone guidelines. Outputs draft for human review before sending — never sends autonomously.
knownLimitations: Does not send email autonomously — always requires human approval and send action
Tone calibration requires at least 5 example emails in the tone profile
Cannot access attachments or external documents without explicit configuration
changelogSummary: v1.1.0: Added multi-subject-line suggestions. v1.0.0: Initial release.
documentationSnippet: Always set `requiresHumanApproval: true` in your workflow config when using this skill. Email drafts are staged in a review queue, never auto-sent.
seoTitle: Email Drafter Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Draft personalized sales emails and follow-ups with AI — always with human review before sending. Integrated with your CRM context.

name: Contract Parser
shortDescription: Extracts key clauses, dates, parties, obligations, and risk flags from contract documents (PDF, DOCX) and outputs structured data for review, comparison, or CRM population.
knownLimitations: Accuracy degrades on scanned PDFs without OCR pre-processing
Complex multi-party contracts with cross-references require manual review of extracted data
Not a substitute for legal counsel — outputs are for triage and organization only
changelogSummary: v1.4.0: Added risk flag keyword configuration. v1.3.0: DOCX support. v1.2.0: Improved date extraction accuracy.
documentationSnippet: Use `extraction_schema` to specify which clause types to target. Default schema covers dates, parties, payment terms, termination, and IP ownership.
seoTitle: Contract Parser Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Extract key clauses, dates, and risk flags from contracts automatically. Structured output for review — not a replacement for legal counsel.

name: Invoice Processor
shortDescription: Extracts invoice data (vendor, amount, due date, line items) from PDF/image files, validates against PO records, and creates draft entries in your accounting system for human approval.
knownLimitations: OCR accuracy varies with invoice formatting quality
PO matching requires structured PO database; ad-hoc POs require manual mapping
Multi-currency invoices require configured exchange rate source
changelogSummary: v1.2.0: Added configurable approval threshold. v1.1.0: PO matching logic improved. v1.0.0: Initial release.
documentationSnippet: Set `approval_threshold_cad` to define the invoice amount above which all entries go to human approval queue regardless of PO match.
seoTitle: Invoice Processor Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Automate invoice data extraction and AP processing with AI — always with human approval before posting to your accounting system.

name: Alert Digest
shortDescription: Aggregates alerts and notifications from multiple monitoring sources (uptime, security, analytics, CRM triggers) and delivers a prioritized digest on a configured schedule, reducing notification fatigue.
knownLimitations: Does not auto-remediate issues — digest is informational only
Priority scoring is rule-based; ML-based prioritization not yet available
Requires webhook endpoints from source systems; pull-based polling not supported in v1
changelogSummary: v1.0.1: Fixed duplicate alert deduplication. v1.0.0: Initial release.
documentationSnippet: Configure `suppression_rules` to prevent repeat alerts from the same source within a time window (e.g., `{source: 'uptime-monitor', suppress_minutes: 60}`).
seoTitle: Alert Digest Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Reduce alert fatigue with the Alert Digest skill — aggregates and prioritizes notifications from all your monitoring tools into a single scheduled digest.

name: Meeting Notes Extractor
shortDescription: Processes meeting transcripts or recordings and extracts action items, decisions, follow-ups, and key discussion points into a structured summary. Integrates with calendar and CRM to push updates automatically.
knownLimitations: Accuracy depends on transcript quality — noisy audio transcripts reduce precision
Speaker identification requires labeled transcript input
Action item detection is heuristic-based; edge cases may require human review
changelogSummary: v1.3.0: CRM integration for automatic note posting. v1.2.0: Multi-participant speaker labeling. v1.0.0: Initial release.
documentationSnippet: Pass `output_destination: 'crm'` to automatically post the summary as a CRM note linked to `crm_deal_id`. Requires CRM API credentials.
seoTitle: Meeting Notes Extractor Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Extract action items, decisions, and follow-ups from meeting transcripts automatically. Push results to CRM and task managers.

name: Job Ad Writer
shortDescription: Generates structured, compliant job advertisements from role briefs. Applies inclusive language guidelines, Canadian employment law compliance checks, and outputs multi-channel formats (ATS, LinkedIn, website).
knownLimitations: Compliance checks are informational — not a substitute for HR legal review
Inclusive language scoring is guideline-based, not certified
Salary range requirements vary by province; manual verification recommended
changelogSummary: v1.1.0: Added provincial compliance notes for ON/BC/QC. v1.0.0: Initial release.
documentationSnippet: Set `compliance_jurisdiction` to `canada-federal`, `ontario`, `british-columbia`, or `quebec` for jurisdiction-specific compliance notes.
seoTitle: Job Ad Writer Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Generate compliant, inclusive job advertisements from role briefs automatically — with Canadian employment law checks and multi-channel output.

name: Report Builder
shortDescription: Assembles structured reports (operational, financial, project status) from multiple data sources on a configured schedule. Produces formatted output in PDF, Markdown, or HTML with charts and tables.
knownLimitations: Chart types limited to bar, line, pie, and table — custom visualizations require template customization
Large datasets (>100k rows) may require paginated data source queries
PDF rendering requires configured headless browser environment
changelogSummary: v2.1.0: Added chart rendering support. v2.0.0: Multi-source data assembly. v1.0.0: Initial markdown-only report generation.
documentationSnippet: Create a `report_template_id` in your config directory using the Report Builder template format. See `/docs/templates/report-builder.md` for schema.
seoTitle: Report Builder Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Automatically assemble operational, financial, and project reports from multiple data sources on schedule — PDF, HTML, and Markdown output.

name: Candidate Screener
shortDescription: Reviews incoming applications against role requirements, scores candidates on configured criteria, and produces a ranked shortlist with justification notes for the hiring manager to review.
knownLimitations: All AI screening outputs must be reviewed by a human before candidate notifications
Does not have access to real-time LinkedIn profiles — uses application data only
Bias mitigation features are advisory; responsible use requires human oversight per CHRC guidelines
changelogSummary: v1.2.0: Added CHRC bias advisory notes. v1.1.0: ATS integration improvements. v1.0.0: Initial release.
documentationSnippet: Always configure `requiresHumanApproval: true` for this skill. Canadian Human Rights Commission guidelines apply to automated screening tools.
seoTitle: Candidate Screener Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Screen and rank job applicants automatically against role requirements — with human review required before any candidate communications.

name: Data Pipeline Monitor
shortDescription: Monitors scheduled data pipelines and integrations for failures, delays, and data quality anomalies. Sends structured alerts with diagnostic context when issues are detected.
knownLimitations: Beta: anomaly detection thresholds require tuning for each pipeline during initial deployment
Does not auto-remediate pipeline failures — alert and diagnostic output only
Supports REST API health checks only; gRPC and custom protocols require custom adapters
changelogSummary: v1.0.0: Initial beta release with REST health checks and anomaly alerting.
documentationSnippet: Configure `quality_thresholds` per pipeline (e.g., `{row_count_min: 100, null_rate_max: 0.05}`). Thresholds outside range trigger alerts.
seoTitle: Data Pipeline Monitor Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Monitor data pipelines and integrations for failures and anomalies. Structured alerts with diagnostic context — no auto-remediation.

name: Social Content Scheduler
shortDescription: Generates a weekly social media content calendar from a topic brief, drafts posts for LinkedIn and other channels, and stages them for human approval before scheduling publication.
knownLimitations: All posts staged for human approval — never published autonomously
Image generation not included; requires separate image asset workflow
Platform API rate limits may delay scheduling after approval
changelogSummary: v1.1.0: Added LinkedIn-specific formatting. v1.0.0: Initial release.
documentationSnippet: Pass `brand_voice_guidelines` as a structured document with tone adjectives, prohibited terms, and example posts. Quality improves significantly with good examples.
seoTitle: Social Content Scheduler Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Generate and schedule social media content with AI — drafts LinkedIn posts from topic briefs with human approval before any publication.

name: CRM Data Quality
shortDescription: Scans CRM records for missing fields, duplicate contacts, stale deals, and data inconsistencies. Produces a prioritized cleanup report and optionally applies auto-corrections to low-risk issues.
knownLimitations: Auto-corrections limited to clearly safe changes (e.g., phone number formatting) — merges and deletes always require human approval
Deduplication suggestions require human review before merge
Scan performance depends on CRM API rate limits
changelogSummary: v1.0.0: Initial release with HubSpot and Salesforce support.
documentationSnippet: Set `auto_fix_rules` to specify which low-risk corrections can be applied without approval (e.g., `format_phone: true`, `capitalize_names: true`). Merges are never auto-applied.
seoTitle: CRM Data Quality Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Automatically scan and clean CRM data — fix missing fields, deduplicate contacts, and flag stale deals with a prioritized cleanup report.

name: Workflow Orchestrator
shortDescription: Coordinates multi-step agent workflows by managing task sequencing, conditional branching, error handling, and human approval gates. Acts as the conductor for complex multi-skill automations.
knownLimitations: Complex workflows with >20 steps require thorough testing before production deployment
Circular dependency detection is available but does not cover all edge cases
Parallel branch execution limited to 5 concurrent branches in standard tier
changelogSummary: v1.5.0: Added conditional branching and parallel execution. v1.2.0: Human approval gate support. v1.0.0: Sequential workflow execution.
documentationSnippet: Define your workflow in YAML using the OpenClaw Workflow Schema. Use `approval_gate` step type to insert human review points. See `/docs/workflow-schema.md`.
seoTitle: Workflow Orchestrator Skill | OpenClaw AI Agents
seoDescription: Coordinate complex multi-step AI agent workflows with conditional branching, error handling, and human approval gates built in.
